channel.title: Prince George's County Crime Alerts
channel.description: Automated alerts from PGPD Daily Crime Report data: spikes, records, milestones, streaks and data revisions.

item.title: Total Crime at a recent low: 254 in the past 7 days
item.description: Total Crime: 254 reported in the 7 days ending Jul. 9, vs. an average of 291.8 per week over the prior 8 weeks — below every one of those weeks.

item.title: Property Crime Total at a recent low: 188 in the past 7 days
item.description: Property Crime Total: 188 reported in the 7 days ending Jul. 9, vs. an average of 227.6 per week over the prior 8 weeks — below every one of those weeks.

item.title: DV Assault (Other Weapon) spike: 7 in the past 7 days
item.description: DV Assault (Other Weapon): 7 reported in the 7 days ending Jul. 9, vs. an average of 2.1 per week over the prior 8 weeks — and above every one of those weeks. Worth a call to PGPD.

item.title: 13 days without a non-fatal shooting — longest stretch on record
item.description: No non-fatal shooting reports since Jun. 25, the longest such stretch since tracking began Feb. 8, 2026.

item.title: Stolen Vehicle at a recent low: 43 in the past 7 days
item.description: Stolen Vehicle: 43 reported in the 7 days ending Jul. 8, vs. an average of 66.9 per week over the prior 8 weeks — below every one of those weeks.

item.title: Other Theft at a recent low: 62 in the past 7 days
item.description: Other Theft: 62 reported in the 7 days ending Jul. 8, vs. an average of 85.6 per week over the prior 8 weeks — below every one of those weeks.

item.title: Commercial Burglary spike: 8 in the past 7 days
item.description: Commercial Burglary: 8 reported in the 7 days ending Jul. 8, vs. an average of 4.0 per week over the prior 8 weeks — and above every one of those weeks. Worth a call to PGPD.

item.title: Domestic Violence: worst 7-day stretch on record (36)
item.description: The 36 domestic violence reports in the 7 days ending Jul. 7 are the most in any 7-day window since tracking began Feb. 8, 2026 (previous high: 35).

item.title: DV Assault (No Weapon) spike: 28 in the past 7 days
item.description: DV Assault (No Weapon): 28 reported in the 7 days ending Jul. 6, vs. an average of 21.9 per week over the prior 8 weeks — and above every one of those weeks. Worth a call to PGPD.

item.title: Domestic Violence spike: 31 in the past 7 days
item.description: Domestic Violence: 31 reported in the 7 days ending Jul. 6, vs. an average of 24.2 per week over the prior 8 weeks — and above every one of those weeks. Worth a call to PGPD.

item.title: PGPD revised previously published figures: Murder
item.description: The Jul. 5 report restates earlier daily counts: Murder on Jul. 4: 0 -> 1. Reclassifications like these are worth asking the department about.

item.title: Burglary spike: 17 in the past 7 days
item.description: Burglary: 17 reported in the 7 days ending Jul. 2, vs. an average of 9.5 per week over the prior 8 weeks — and above every one of those weeks. Worth a call to PGPD.

item.title: Assault (No Weapon) at a recent low: 12 in the past 7 days
item.description: Assault (No Weapon): 12 reported in the 7 days ending Jul. 2, vs. an average of 19.1 per week over the prior 8 weeks — below every one of those weeks.

item.title: Assault at a recent low: 19 in the past 7 days
item.description: Assault: 19 reported in the 7 days ending Jul. 2, vs. an average of 29.2 per week over the prior 8 weeks — below every one of those weeks.

item.title: PGPD revised previously published figures: Murder
item.description: The Jun. 28 report restates earlier daily counts: Murder on Jun. 26: 0 -> 1. Reclassifications like these are worth asking the department about.

item.title: Total Crime: 8000 for the year
item.description: Total Crime reports reached 8000 for 2026 as of Jun. 28. That is down 15% from this point in 2025 (9381).

item.title: Theft from Auto: worst 7-day stretch on record (89)
item.description: The 89 theft from auto reports in the 7 days ending Jun. 27 are the most in any 7-day window since tracking began Feb. 8, 2026 (previous high: 87).

item.title: Total Crime: worst 7-day stretch on record (322)
item.description: The 322 total crime reports in the 7 days ending Jun. 26 are the most in any 7-day window since tracking began Feb. 8, 2026 (previous high: 317).

item.title: Total Crime spike: 322 in the past 7 days
item.description: Total Crime: 322 reported in the 7 days ending Jun. 26, vs. an average of 280.2 per week over the prior 8 weeks — and above every one of those weeks. Worth a call to PGPD.

item.title: Property Crime Total spike: 260 in the past 7 days
item.description: Property Crime Total: 260 reported in the 7 days ending Jun. 26, vs. an average of 217.0 per week over the prior 8 weeks — and above every one of those weeks. Worth a call to PGPD.

item.title: Stolen Vehicle spike: 82 in the past 7 days
item.description: Stolen Vehicle: 82 reported in the 7 days ending Jun. 26, vs. an average of 62.8 per week over the prior 8 weeks — and above every one of those weeks. Worth a call to PGPD.

item.title: Theft from Auto spike: 87 in the past 7 days
item.description: Theft from Auto: 87 reported in the 7 days ending Jun. 26, vs. an average of 60.0 per week over the prior 8 weeks — and above every one of those weeks. Worth a call to PGPD.

item.title: Property Crime Total: 6000 for the year
item.description: Property Crime Total reports reached 6043 for 2026 as of Jun. 23. That is down 17% from this point in 2025 (7250).

item.title: Burglary spike: 15 in the past 7 days
item.description: Burglary: 15 reported in the 7 days ending Jun. 22, vs. an average of 9.9 per week over the prior 8 weeks — and above every one of those weeks. Worth a call to PGPD.

item.title: DV Assault (No Weapon) spike: 26 in the past 7 days
item.description: DV Assault (No Weapon): 26 reported in the 7 days ending Jun. 22, vs. an average of 21.1 per week over the prior 8 weeks — and above every one of those weeks. Worth a call to PGPD.

item.title: Domestic Violence spike: 30 in the past 7 days
item.description: Domestic Violence: 30 reported in the 7 days ending Jun. 22, vs. an average of 23.9 per week over the prior 8 weeks — and above every one of those weeks. Worth a call to PGPD.

item.title: Robbery: 175 for the year
item.description: Robbery reports reached 175 for 2026 as of Jun. 22. That is down 51% from this point in 2025 (358).

item.title: Commercial Burglary spike: 6 in the past 7 days
item.description: Commercial Burglary: 6 reported in the 7 days ending Jun. 20, vs. an average of 3.1 per week over the prior 8 weeks — and above every one of those weeks. Worth a call to PGPD.

item.title: Violent Crime Total spike: 73 in the past 7 days
item.description: Violent Crime Total: 73 reported in the 7 days ending Jun. 20, vs. an average of 61.5 per week over the prior 8 weeks — and above every one of those weeks. Worth a call to PGPD.

item.title: 11 days without a non-fatal shooting — longest stretch on record
item.description: No non-fatal shooting reports since Jun. 7, the longest such stretch since tracking began Feb. 8, 2026.

item.title: Assault (Other Weapon) spike: 10 in the past 7 days
item.description: Assault (Other Weapon): 10 reported in the 7 days ending Jun. 13, vs. an average of 6.8 per week over the prior 8 weeks — and above every one of those weeks. Worth a call to PGPD.

item.title: 11 days without a carjacking — longest stretch on record
item.description: No carjacking reports since Jun. 1, the longest such stretch since tracking began Feb. 8, 2026.

item.title: Total Crime: 7000 for the year
item.description: Total Crime reports reached 7057 for 2026 as of Jun. 9. That is down 15% from this point in 2025 (8304).

item.title: Total Crime at a recent low: 242 in the past 7 days
item.description: Total Crime: 242 reported in the 7 days ending Jun. 9, vs. an average of 277.0 per week over the prior 8 weeks — below every one of those weeks.

item.title: Property Crime Total: 5500 for the year
item.description: Property Crime Total reports reached 5514 for 2026 as of Jun. 9. That is down 17% from this point in 2025 (6643).

item.title: Property Crime Total at a recent low: 183 in the past 7 days
item.description: Property Crime Total: 183 reported in the 7 days ending Jun. 9, vs. an average of 215.9 per week over the prior 8 weeks — below every one of those weeks.

item.title: Violent Crime Total spike: 71 in the past 7 days
item.description: Violent Crime Total: 71 reported in the 7 days ending Jun. 5, vs. an average of 59.4 per week over the prior 8 weeks — and above every one of those weeks. Worth a call to PGPD.

item.title: DV Assault (No Weapon): worst 7-day stretch on record (33)
item.description: The 33 dv assault (no weapon) reports in the 7 days ending Jun. 5 are the most in any 7-day window since tracking began Feb. 8, 2026 (previous high: 30).

item.title: Domestic Violence: worst 7-day stretch on record (35)
item.description: The 35 domestic violence reports in the 7 days ending Jun. 5 are the most in any 7-day window since tracking began Feb. 8, 2026 (previous high: 34).

item.title: Domestic Violence spike: 35 in the past 7 days
item.description: Domestic Violence: 35 reported in the 7 days ending Jun. 5, vs. an average of 20.5 per week over the prior 8 weeks — and above every one of those weeks. Worth a call to PGPD.

item.title: PGPD revised previously published figures: Murder
item.description: The Jun. 4 report restates earlier daily counts: Murder on Jun. 2: 0 -> 1. Reclassifications like these are worth asking the department about.

item.title: Violent Crime Total: 1500 for the year
item.description: Violent Crime Total reports reached 1507 for 2026 as of Jun. 4. That is down 6% from this point in 2025 (1602).

item.title: DV Assault (No Weapon) spike: 30 in the past 7 days
item.description: DV Assault (No Weapon): 30 reported in the 7 days ending Jun. 4, vs. an average of 18.9 per week over the prior 8 weeks — and above every one of those weeks. Worth a call to PGPD.

item.title: Stolen Vehicle spike: 82 in the past 7 days
item.description: Stolen Vehicle: 82 reported in the 7 days ending Jun. 3, vs. an average of 60.8 per week over the prior 8 weeks — and above every one of those weeks. Worth a call to PGPD.

item.title: Citizen Robbery spike: 8 in the past 7 days
item.description: Citizen Robbery: 8 reported in the 7 days ending Jun. 2, vs. an average of 3.8 per week over the prior 8 weeks — and above every one of those weeks. Worth a call to PGPD.

item.title: Larceny spike: 177 in the past 7 days
item.description: Larceny: 177 reported in the 7 days ending Jun. 1, vs. an average of 137.9 per week over the prior 8 weeks — and above every one of those weeks. Worth a call to PGPD.

item.title: Assault at a recent low: 17 in the past 7 days
item.description: Assault: 17 reported in the 7 days ending Jun. 1, vs. an average of 29.6 per week over the prior 8 weeks — below every one of those weeks.

item.title: Total Crime spike: 308 in the past 7 days
item.description: Total Crime: 308 reported in the 7 days ending May. 30, vs. an average of 276.1 per week over the prior 8 weeks — and above every one of those weeks. Worth a call to PGPD.

item.title: Property Crime Total: worst 7-day stretch on record (256)
item.description: The 256 property crime total reports in the 7 days ending May. 30 are the most in any 7-day window since tracking began Feb. 8, 2026 (previous high: 255).

item.title: Property Crime Total spike: 256 in the past 7 days
item.description: Property Crime Total: 256 reported in the 7 days ending May. 30, vs. an average of 215.8 per week over the prior 8 weeks — and above every one of those weeks. Worth a call to PGPD.
